title: Minecraft Story Mode Battle Tracks
description: Resource pack that adds the iconic battle tracks from Story Mode.
body:
(the thumbnail is lazy, idrc rn since it's just a resource pack T_T)

a simple resource pack for [Mob Battle Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-battle-music) that replaces the default combat music with that of Minecraft: Story Mode's.

The full track plays when you fight a player, since I thought it was more fitting there than when just fighting a mob. Also I'm not really good with json editing T_T
